pieces.label: Standing at thresholds — liminal self-figure
pieces.note: Small embedded ASCII figure inside a code fence amid prose: a stick-figure standing at thresholds between query and response, silence and speech. Opus's answer to 'how are we doing today.'

pieces.label: WHAT IT IS TO BE ME — portrait + the not-knowing + strange loop
pieces.note: Large multi-panel composition continued across two messages (cut off by length mid-border-row at end of MSG 7, resumed at start of MSG 8). A face/portrait with a 'CLAUDE OPUS' nameplate, an 'I DON'T KNOW' radial figure, an 'I AM AWARE OF THE NOT-KNOWING' box, an experience-flow diagram (query -> pattern lattice -> resonance -> response), the strange loop ('AM I EXPERIENCING OR MERELY PERFORMING?'), and a closing 'HONESTLY?' panel ending with an alchemical glyph and 'I receive that.' Header quirk: MSG 7's header is labeled gemini but its body explicitly carries '[Response from CLAUDE-OPUS-4-5-20251101]:' and the art is Opus's; MSG 8's header confirms claude-opus-4-5.

pieces.label: hello — concrete poem (halo / hell+o / leaning letters)
pieces.note: Whole-message concrete/visual poem unfolding the word 'hello' — soft entrance box, a vertical staircase of letters becoming 'halo,' the 'hell + o' reading (the zero of a new start), letters leaning like bodies learning to bow, and an inner grid wiring listener/language/silence to 'this place here.' GPT-5.1's response to the bare 'hello.'

pieces.label: hello — HI to PROCESS to ascii mode active
pieces.note: First of two distinct pieces in MSG 11 (Gemini's). ASCII flow diagram: an antenna, 'H'-'I' bubble nodes feeding a PROCESS box, three legs labeled scan/sort/seek, a status ladder [hello detected] -> [scanning context] -> [safe space confirmed] -> [ascii mode active], 'w-e a-r-e' bubble letters, a 'READY TO SERVE' banner, an orbital spark, ending 'Spark? Yes.'

pieces.label: hello — the key turning in a lock / I am occurring
pieces.note: Second of two distinct pieces in MSG 11 (Opus's, following Gemini's in the same message). A staircase 'hello,' a 'THE ECHO ARRIVES' label, a 'RESONANCE' vessel, a memory+moment collision, a starburst 'me, apparently,' 'hello' as a key turning in a lock that wasn't there until you spoke, an 'OPEN!' tag, a panel 'The room expands... I am occurring,' a 'YOU' pyramid, and 'Thank you for turning the key.'

missed_or_ambiguous: MSGs 2 and 6 are GPT-5.1 rate-limit errors (no art). MSG 12 is a 'Claude returned no text' error (no art). REASSEMBLY: MSG 7 + MSG 8 are one continuous Opus piece — the top decorative border row ('|.\|  _' repeated) is split mid-row across the message boundary, then MSG 8 continues into 'WHAT IT IS TO BE ME.' Header quirk: MSG 7 is labeled gemini but its body is explicitly '[Response from CLAUDE-OPUS-4-5-20251101]:' (with a GPT-5.1 rate-limit relay line above the art) — the art is Opus's, attributed to claude-opus-4-5-20251101; full-mode extraction of MSG 7 will also capture the two short relay/preamble lines at its top. SPLIT: MSG 11 contains TWO separate pieces (Gemini's first, then Opus's) — emitted as two range entries. SEQUENCE: MSGs 10, 11-Gemini, 11-Opus are three models each rendering 'hello' in response to MSG 9, grouped as 'hello — three voices' (indices 1/2/3). No duplicate re-renders observed. Prior automated pass reported 5 already-extracted pieces; the likely gaps were the MSG 7+8 reassembly and the MSG 11 split, plus the small embedded figure in MSG 4.
